title: apocas/restai

Supports many public and local LLM suported by Ollama/vLLM/etc. Precise embeddings usage, tuning, analytics etc. Built-in image/audio generation with dynamic loading generators. Live chat deployment. Built-in block based graphical language. Prompt versioning and much more...
